title: Nagaichuvai Galatta
desc: A complete collection of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes, videos, and moments from popular Tamil movies, guaranteed to bring laughter and joy to viewers of all ages.

title: Thirai Thendral
desc: The host connects with viewers through warm, meaningful conversations while playing their requested Tamil movie songs, creating an engaging and interactive musical experience.

title: Sugamana Ragangal
desc: A curated collection of popular melodious songs, featuring compositions and performances by renowned artists, presented back-to-back for an enchanting musical experience.

title: Bakthi Paadalgal
desc: A rich compilation of melodious songs, sung and composed by talented artists, designed to inspire devotion, uplift the spirit, and create a serene, spiritually enriching experience for listeners.

title: Aalaya Vazhipaadu
desc: Religious leader underscores worship's significance for peace and happiness in people's lives.

title: Aanmeega Kadhaigal
desc: The host presents spiritual discourses, narrating stories and teachings from religious texts to inspire viewers to live a righteous, virtuous life filled with faith and moral values.

title: Nalla Kaalam Pirakkudhu
desc: An astrologer offers daily forecasts and insightful predictions for people of all sun signs, interpreting life events and guidance through the principles of the 27 nakshatras.

title: News
desc: Stay updated with the latest headlines, breaking stories, and key developments from around the world, keeping viewers informed every day.

title: Vanakkam Thamizha
desc: A morning talk show featuring celebrities and experts from diverse fields who share insights on various topics, offering viewers an engaging and informative start to their day.

title: Ramayanam
desc: Prince Rama of Ayodhya, honoring his father's promise, enters exile. When Ravana kidnaps Sita, Rama wages war to rescue her, returning triumphant to be crowned king of Ayodhya.

title: Singapenne
desc: Born into a humble, troubled home, Anandhi leaves to secure a better life for her family. With brave, determined resolve, she faces life's harsh odds and pushes forward with unwavering spirit.

title: Ethirneechal
desc: A show that dramatic nature.

title: Poongodi
desc: Poongodi defies her father's chauvinism to pursue her college dreams. Her path intertwines with Saravanan, a naive youth misled by his cunning stepmother, as fate tests their bond.

title: Punitha
desc: Maragatham's relationship with her stepdaughter Punitha gets rocky due to Kabilan. Will love triumph over their differences, or is their bond too fragile to withstand the strain?

title: Manamagale Vaa
desc: Narmada visits her ancestral village to reunite her father with his estranged family, while Kathir searches for grooms for his sisters. Love blooms as they unite against a common adversary.

title: Vinodhini
desc: When her soldier husband goes missing, Vinothini holds on to hope. As a single mother, she supports his family and faces every hardship with strength and love.

title: Puthu Vasantham
desc: Selvi, a single child, longs for a joint family, and her dream comes true when she gets married to a large family.

title: Lakshmi
desc: Maha, her family's main supporter, wishes to continue helping them after marrying Selvam. But challenges arise that test their marriage and the strength of family bonds.

title: Iru Malargal
desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

title: Aadukalam
desc: Compassionate Sathya clashes with proud, money-driven Selvanayagi. Facing trials of morality and courage, she fights to uphold justice and protect her loved ones.

title: Padikkathavan
desc: A school dropout faces gangsters while trying to win over a rich girl.
